name: Hemorrhagic Shock
descs:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Laceration] or 'Unique Bleed'. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

On ally Clash Win: activate the enemy's [Laceration] once and reduce [Laceration] Count by 1 (once per turn for each ally)

Enemies become Staggerable by [Laceration] Damage; if an enemy gets Staggered due to [Laceration] damage mid-Clash, activate [Laceration] (# of remaining enemy Coins) times and reduce [Laceration] Count by (# of [Laceration] activations)

If all enemies have [Laceration], they lose 2 Defense Levels. At Turn End, inflict (# of [Laceration] activations x 2) [DefenseDown] next turn (max 20)

When inflicting [Laceration] Potency or 'Unique Bleed' with Skill effects, inflict 3 [Laceration] Potency and +1 [Laceration] Count on the target
